page.breadcrumbNav: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-5 overflow-x-auto
page.breadcrumbList: flex flex-nowrap items-center text-sm text-neutral-500 whitespace-nowrap min-w-0
page.main: product-page-minimal max-w-6xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-12 md:py-20
page.galleryBox: relative bg-neutral-50 overflow-hidden border border-neutral-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm group
page.imageCounter: absolute bottom-3 right-3 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md bg-neutral-900/80 text-neutral-100 text-xs font-medium tracking-wide
page.navBtn: absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-white/95 border border-neutral-200 opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-white hover:shadow text-neutral-600 hover:text-neutral-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:hover:bg-white/95
page.navBtnNext: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-white/95 border border-neutral-200 opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-white hover:shadow text-neutral-600 hover:text-neutral-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:hover:bg-white/95
page.thumbStrip: flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1 pt-1 snap-x scrollbar-hide
page.thumbBtn: relative flex-none aspect-square w-24 overflow-hidden snap-start border-2 rounded-lg border-neutral-200 hover:border-neutral-400 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2 bg-neutral-50
page.descriptionSection: product-details-section rounded-2xl bg-neutral-50 border border-neutral-200 overflow-hidden shadow-sm
page.descriptionHeaderTitle: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-600 flex items-center gap-3
page.descriptionHeaderIcon: w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-neutral-200/90 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
page.descriptionContentInner: rounded-xl bg-white border border-neutral-200/90 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
page.descriptionContent: prose prose-sm max-w-none overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 text-neutral-700
page.descriptionOverlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-24 pointer-events-none bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/90 to-transparent
page.showMoreBtn: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-neutral-700 hover:text-neutral-900 bg-neutral-50 hover:bg-neutral-100 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-neutral-200 hover:border-neutral-300 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2
page.detailInfoBox: flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 rounded-xl bg-white border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm border-l-4 border-l-neutral-400
page.detailInfoIcon: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-neutral-100 flex-shrink-0
page.relatedCardRoot: group product-card flex flex-col h-full bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] transition-all duration-300 border border-neutral-100 hover:border-neutral-200
page.relatedCardMedia: relative aspect-[3/4] min-h-[200px] overflow-hidden bg-neutral-50 flex items-center justify-center
page.relatedCardNoImageWrap: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-neutral-100
page.relatedCardSaleBadge: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
page.relatedCardTitle: text-sm font-medium text-neutral-900 group-hover:text-neutral-600 transition-colors line-clamp-2 leading-snug mb-2
page.relatedCardArrow: text-neutral-400 group-hover:text-neutral-900 group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-all duration-200 flex-shrink-0
page.imageGridWrap: grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 lg:sticky lg:top-28 lg:self-start
page.imageGridItem: relative w-full aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-50
